results.Author: Morgan Ellis
results.Preview: Defines employee benefits elections and the 2026 open enrollment window running January 5 through January 30. Employees must confirm elections in the benefits portal before the window closes; the help desk maintains a known-issues list for portal login failures during peak enrollment, the same class of issue seen in customer support case CAS-260137. Late elections default to prior-year coverage.
results.Title: Employee Benefits and Open Enrollment Policy 2026

results.Author: Morgan Ellis
results.Preview: Sets accrual rates, carryover limits, and request procedures for paid time off, sick leave, and parental leave. Accruals post on the first business day of each month and unused carryover above five days lapses at fiscal year end. Managers approve requests in the HR portal within three business days.
results.Title: Paid Time Off and Leave Policy

results.Author: Morgan Ellis
results.Preview: Covers reimbursable business expenses, receipt thresholds, and submission deadlines. Expense reports are due within thirty days of the expense date, itemized receipts are required above twenty-five dollars, and mileage is reimbursed at the published standard rate. Finance rejects reports that mix personal and business charges on a single line.
results.Title: Expense Reimbursement Policy

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Governs issuance and use of corporate purchasing cards, including single-transaction limits and prohibited merchant categories. Currently under review to raise the field technician transaction limit for on-site parts purchases and to add a monthly reconciliation checklist. Card misuse triggers immediate suspension pending finance review.
results.Title: Corporate Purchasing Card Policy

results.Author: Morgan Ellis
results.Preview: Establishes acceptable use of company systems, password and multifactor requirements, and incident reporting duties. All staff must report suspected phishing within one hour of discovery and complete annual security awareness training. Device encryption is mandatory for laptops and any device storing customer document previews.
results.Title: Information Security and Acceptable Use Policy

results.Author: Casey Rivera
results.Preview: Defines how customer document content, contact records, and service history may be stored, shared, and retained. Customer files stay within approved document libraries, exports require manager approval, and synthetic or anonymized data must be used in all demos and testing. Violations are treated as security incidents.
results.Title: Customer Data Handling Standard

results.Author: Morgan Ellis
results.Preview: Master retention schedule for contracts, invoices, service records, and personnel files. Executed contracts are retained for seven years after expiration, service case records for five years after closure, and meeting notes for two years unless attached to an active contract. Legal hold overrides all scheduled disposition.
results.Title: Records Retention Schedule

results.Author: Morgan Ellis
results.Preview: Sets eligibility, equipment, and availability expectations for remote and hybrid work arrangements. Under review to clarify core collaboration hours and home-office equipment reimbursement caps ahead of the next fiscal year. Field service roles remain on-site by default with dispatch-based scheduling.
results.Title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy
